message: Add group volume and mute commands

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,13 @@ All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
 
 The format is based on “Keep a Changelog”, and this project aims to follow Semantic Versioning.
 
+## [0.1.5] - 2025-12-13
+
+### Added
+- Group audio controls via `GroupRenderingControl`:
+  - `sonos group volume get|set --name "<Room>"`
+  - `sonos group mute get|on|off|toggle --name "<Room>"`
+
 ## [0.1.4] - 2025-12-13
 
 ### Added

@@ -115,6 +115,16 @@ Re-join a speaker back into another group:
 ./sonos group join --name "Office" --to "Bar"
 ```
 
+Group volume / mute (affects the whole group):
+
+```bash
+./sonos group volume get --name "Living Room"
+./sonos group volume set --name "Living Room" 25
+
+./sonos group mute get --name "Living Room"
+./sonos group mute toggle --name "Living Room"
+```
+
 Volume / mute:
 
 ```bash

@@ -38,6 +38,8 @@ Legend:
   - `sonos group mute get|on|off|toggle --name "<AnyMember>"`
 - Notes:
   - Uses `GroupRenderingControl` service (similar to SoCo patterns).
+ - Status:
+   - Implemented in `0.1.5`.
 
 4) **Presets / scenes**
 - Value: High | Effort: L | Deps: none

@@ -123,6 +123,8 @@ Implementation detail: we generate Sonos-compatible DIDL metadata similar to SoC
   - Sends `AVTransport.SetAVTransportURI` to the *joining* speaker with `x-rincon:<COORDINATOR_UUID>`.
 - `sonos group unjoin --name "<Room>"`
   - Sends `AVTransport.BecomeCoordinatorOfStandaloneGroup` to the target speaker.
+- `sonos group volume get|set --name "<Room>" <0-100>`
+- `sonos group mute get|on|off|toggle --name "<Room>"`
 
 ## Coordinator Awareness

@@ -46,6 +46,8 @@ func newGroupCmd(flags *rootFlags) *cobra.Command {
 	cmd.AddCommand(newGroupStatusCmd(flags))
 	cmd.AddCommand(newGroupJoinCmd(flags))
 	cmd.AddCommand(newGroupUnjoinCmd(flags))
+	cmd.AddCommand(newGroupVolumeCmd(flags))
+	cmd.AddCommand(newGroupMuteCmd(flags))
 	return cmd
 }
